subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Wronged One unto them that have believed in God, the All-Possessing, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, He speaketh the truth: there is no God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم انه ینطق بالحق انه لا اله الا
